name: prd-split-artifact-pipeline
title: PRD split artifact pipeline with cluster subagents and diff replay
description: Replace ad-hoc PRD split flow with a Trellis-anchored artifact pipeline: cluster planner -> short-lived splitter subagents -> normalizer -> Trellis writer; preserve sourceRequirementIds/taskAnchors/claudeSplitMapping traceability; enable diff replay; redesign UI as a 4-stage wizard while keeping anchor-highlighting and existing schema.
creator: xuning
